message:
feat(extension-host): parameterize manifest validation by config, fix timestamp tracking, derive engine version

Structural improvements to the extension-host crate:

- Add ExtensionHostConfig struct with max_extensions, max_manifest_size,
  max_dependency_count, max_permission_count limits
- validate_manifest_with_config() and validate_manifest_with_context_and_config()
  accept ExtensionHostConfig for parameterized validation
- compute_content_hash zeroes publisher_signature before hashing to
  exclude the signature from the content hash
- CURRENT_ENGINE_VERSION now uses env!("CARGO_PKG_VERSION") from
  Cargo.toml instead of a hard-coded string
- Fix ensure_monotonic(): changed to &mut self and actually records
  the timestamp (self.last_timestamp_ns = Some(...))
- New tests for all changes

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
